home.title: Welcome to BouncyHachi
home.subtitle: Dive into the vibrant portal for coding vibes, tools, and fun.
home.introP1: BouncyHachi is a web-based **multi-utility and entertainment hub** created to enrich the digital lives of modern people. We provide powerful tools and fun activities that can be used immediately in the web browser without complex installation or cumbersome membership registration.
home.introP2: From smart **Web Tools** that increase daily work productivity, to **light HTML5 arcade games** that can blow away stress during a short break, to interesting **fortune-telling services** that give a glimpse into the future, a variety of content is updated in real time.
home.introP3: It features a responsive interface (UI) optimized for both mobile and desktop environments, and has an intuitive design with users' convenience as the top priority. Just connect to the web anytime, anywhere, check useful information and IT tips on the blog, and experience various convenient features. BouncyHachi aims to be an AI-based creative hub that awakens your creativity and brings small joy to your daily life.

webToMarkdown.heroTitle:
The ultimate
data refining tool for RAG
webToMarkdown.heroSub: Drop the noisy HTML. Convert any webpage into clean, LLM-friendly Markdown in 1 second.
webToMarkdown.featDesc: Providing an overwhelming pipeline experience to boost LLM performance.
webToMarkdown.feat1Desc: Automatically filters out ads, footers, navigation bars, and noisy elements intelligently to extract pure body content.
webToMarkdown.feat2Desc: Perfectly converts all relative paths and image sources to absolute URLs, preventing context and reference House errors in LLMs.
webToMarkdown.feat3Desc: Achieves extreme parsing speed utilizing Cheerio instead of heavy browsers that consume excess resources. Drastically cuts computing costs.
webToMarkdown.compDesc: A chaotic DOM tree reborn as refined Markdown knowledge.
webToMarkdown.priceTitle: Build your AI pipeline with unbeatable efficiency
webToMarkdown.priceDesc: Forget opaque pricing. Pay only for what you use, at some of the lowest rates in the industry.
webToMarkdown.diveDesc: How did I build this RAG-Ready API?
